title: Write a setup block that switches modes per-test based on tags
prompt: Write a `setup tags do` block inside `test/support/data_case.ex` that: (1) always checks out the sandbox via `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.checkout(MyApp.Repo)`, (2) if `tags[:manual]` is truthy, does NOT call mode — leaves in manual (the default after checkout), (3) if `tags[:shared]` is truthy, calls `mode(MyApp.Repo, {:shared, self()})`, (4) otherwise does nothing additional. Include the full module.
tier_rationale: Conditional logic — slightly non-canonical but reasonable test idiom for module-local overrides.
